name: S-12 merge output is a YAML array of source entries (each starting with `- id:`) per the §2.6 shape
command:
printf -- '- id: a
  url: https://a.com
' > catalog.yaml && printf -- '- id: b
  url: https://b.com
' > operator.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/merge-registry.sh" --catalog catalog.yaml --operator operator.yaml --emit merged.yaml && [ "$(grep -c '^- id:' merged.yaml)" = "2" ] && echo array 1>&2
